title: Gearborn
description: Gearborn is a Minecraft modpack built around the powerful and visually immersive mod Create Mod.
body:
# Gearborn

**Gearborn** is a Create-based Minecraft modpack centered around mechanical creativity, immersive automation, and aesthetic engineering.

This modpack enhances the core experience of the Create mod while staying lightweight, polished, and performance-friendly. Designed for players who love to build intricate contraptions, elegant factories, and kinetic structures — all without bloated content or unnecessary complexity.

## 🌟 What Makes Gearborn Special

- ⚙️ **Create at its Core**: Focused around the power of rotational energy and kinetic machines.
- 🧱 **Survival-First**: Balanced progression and intuitive mechanics suited for long-term playthroughs.
- 🎮 **Smooth Experience**: Carefully curated to run well on a wide range of systems.
- 🎨 **Aesthetic Automation**: Build beautiful and functional designs using immersive tools and visuals.
- 🤝 **Multiplayer Friendly**: Play solo or cooperatively with friends.

## 🔍 Overview

Gearborn is ideal for builders, engineers, and tinkerers who want to dive deep into the Create ecosystem with supporting quality-of-life and performance mods. No magic. No tech bloat. Just gears, shafts, and imagination.

---

> Build. Automate. Thrive.  
> You were born for the gears — **Gearborn**.
